name: Northflank
description: Per-second-billed container platform — services, jobs, ephemeral environments. Good fit for ad-hoc remote builds: a build-service builds-and-deploys from git, a job runs once and exits (great for explicit build steps). Bearer-token authenticated, JWT issued via account or team API tokens with RBAC roles.

credential_fields.name: token
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Generate from app.northflank.com → User/Team Settings → API tokens

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all projects the token has access to.

tools.name: create_combined_service
tools.description: Create a combined (build + deploy) service from a git repo. Args: projectId, name, vcsData ({projectUrl, projectType: github|gitlab|bitbucket, projectBranch}), buildSettings? ({dockerfile?, buildEngine: kaniko|buildkit, nixpacks?}), deployment ({instances, docker?, storage?}).

tools.name: create_build_service
tools.description: Create a build-only service (image is built and pushed to a registry; no deployment). Args: projectId, name, vcsData, buildSettings, repository.

tools.name: trigger_build
tools.description: Trigger a build run on a build-or-combined service. Args: projectId, serviceId, branch?, commit_sha?.

tools.name: get_build
tools.description: Get build status + duration. Args: projectId, serviceId, buildId.

tools.name: list_builds
tools.description: List builds for a service. Args: projectId, serviceId, perPage?, page?.

tools.name: create_job
tools.description: Create a job that builds and runs once. Args: projectId, name, type (manual|cron), spec (container image + command), schedule? (cron expression).

tools.name: run_job
tools.description: Trigger an existing manual job. Args: projectId, jobId.

tools.name: list_services
tools.description: List services in a project. Args: projectId.

tools.name: delete_service
tools.description: Delete a service. Args: projectId, serviceId.
